name: Crock Pot Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 7 small Green and/or red peppers (tops removed and seeded)
1 c Shredded cheese (I use Cheddar or Swiss)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash peppers and drain well.
2. Combine ground chuck, salt, frozen corn, shredded cheese, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, and chopped onion in a mixing bowl. Stir until everything is evenly mixed.
3. Stuff the peppers 2/3 full with the mixture.
4. Pour about 3 tablespoons of water into the bottom of the crock pot.
5. Arrange the stuffed peppers in the crock pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
